channel.title: qwertymarmot.github.io
channel.description: Sharing knowledge is the most fundamental act of friendship. Because it is a way you can give something without loosing something by Richard Stallman

item.title: How confidence can be false and prevent growth
item.description:
Notes:

When we are so confident in our knowledge on a topic it can make us feel that we know everything there is to know on the topic. When we approach a skill with this mindset it will prevent us from growing further. It also prevents us from accepting information from those we would consider less skills in that area.

Source:

Grant, A. M. (2021). Think again: The power of knowing what you don’t know.
